title: Handle implicit task/function imports in the unit scope

features.name: wildcard package import with unit-scope function call
features.description: Code should include a wildcard package import (import pkgname::*), a function declared in that package, and a module that calls that function using a symbol that gets defined later in the same scope

features.name: deferred symbol resolution for implicit package imports
features.description: Code should include a construct where an imported function symbol has a same-named variable declared later in the unit scope, causing the compiler to defer and then fail resolution
